title: COLLATE NOCASE string comparison yields incorrect result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 TEXT, c1 TEXT, c2 INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE t1.c1 <= t1.c0;
SELECT t1.c1 <= t1.c0 FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: COLLATE NOCASE string comparison in WHERE clause
